revision.text:
{{LangSwitch | bn =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট সক্রিয় আছে।}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] আপনার ব্রাউজারে জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট নিষ্ক্রিয় করে রাখা হয়েছে।}}}}}}
| de =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] Du hast JavaScript aktiviert.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript ist in Deinem Browser '''nicht aktiviert'''. Du kannst es im '''''Internet Explorer''''' unter ''Extras→Internetoptionen→Sicherheit→[Stufe auswählen]→Stufe anpassen→Scripting'', im '''''Firefox''''' unter ''Extras→Einstellungen→Inhalt'' (de-)aktivieren. Beachte, dass das Aktivieren besonders bei älteren Versionen zu Sicherheitslücken führen kann.}}}}}}
| el =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] Η JavaScript είναι ενεργή.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] Η JavaScript είναι απενεργοποιημένη στον φυλλομετρητή σας.}}}}}}
| en =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript is active.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript is disabled in your browser.}}}}}}
| hu =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript engedélyezve.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] A JavaScript nincs engedélyezve a böngésződben.}}}}}}
| mk =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript е вклучен.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript is disabled in your browser.}}}}}}
| pl =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript jest włączony.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript е оневозможен на вашиот прелистувач.}}}}}}
| pt =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript está activado.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript está desactivado em seu navegador.}}}}}}
| vi =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript hiện đang hoạt động.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] Trình duyệt của bạn đã tắt JavaScript.}}}}}}
}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing visual file changer
revision.text:
{{LangSwitch | bn =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট সক্রিয় আছে।}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] আপনার ব্রাউজারে জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট নিষ্ক্রিয় করে রাখা হয়েছে।}}}}}}
| de =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] Du hast JavaScript aktiviert.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript ist in Deinem Browser '''nicht aktiviert'''. Du kannst es im '''''Internet Explorer''''' unter ''Extras→Internetoptionen→Sicherheit→[Stufe auswählen]→Stufe anpassen→Scripting'', im '''''Firefox''''' unter ''Extras→Einstellungen→Inhalt'' (de-)aktivieren. Beachte, dass das Aktivieren besonders bei älteren Versionen zu Sicherheitslücken führen kann.}}}}}}
| el =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] Η JavaScript είναι ενεργή.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] Η JavaScript είναι απενεργοποιημένη στον φυλλομετρητή σας.}}}}}}
| en =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript is active.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript is disabled in your browser.}}}}}}
| hu =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript engedélyezve.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] A JavaScript nincs engedélyezve a böngésződben.}}}}}}
| mk =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript е вклучен.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript is disabled in your browser.}}}}}}
| pl =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript jest włączony.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript е оневозможен на вашиот прелистувач.}}}}}}
| pt =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript está activado.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript está desactivado em seu navegador.}}}}}}
| vi =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript hiện đang hoạt động.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] Trình duyệt của bạn đã tắt JavaScript.}}}}}}
}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{LangSwitch | bn =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট সক্রিয় আছে।}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] আপনার ব্রাউজারে জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট নিষ্ক্রিয় করে রাখা হয়েছে।}}}}}}
| de =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] Du hast JavaScript aktiviert.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript ist in Deinem Browser '''nicht aktiviert'''. Du kannst es im '''''Internet Explorer''''' unter ''Extras→Internetoptionen→Sicherheit→[Stufe auswählen]→Stufe anpassen→Scripting'', im '''''Firefox''''' unter ''Extras→Einstellungen→Inhalt'' (de-)aktivieren. Beachte, dass das Aktivieren besonders bei älteren Versionen zu Sicherheitslücken führen kann.}}}}}}
| el =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] Η JavaScript είναι ενεργή.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] Η JavaScript είναι απενεργοποιημένη στον φυλλομετρητή σας.}}}}}}
| en =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript is active.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript is disabled in your browser.}}}}}}
| hu =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript engedélyezve.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] A JavaScript nincs engedélyezve a böngésződben.}}}}}}
| mk =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript е вклучен.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript is disabled in your browser.}}}}}}
| pl =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript jest włączony.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript е оневозможен на вашиот прелистувач.}}}}}}
| pt =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript está activado.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript está desactivado em seu navegador.}}}}}}
| vi =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript hiện đang hoạt động.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] Trình duyệt của bạn đã tắt JavaScript.}}}}}}
}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{LangSwitch | bn =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট সক্রিয় আছে।}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] আপনার ব্রাউজারে জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট নিষ্ক্রিয় করে রাখা হয়েছে।}}}}}}
| de =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] Du hast JavaScript aktiviert.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript ist in Deinem Browser '''nicht aktiviert'''. Du kannst es im '''''Internet Explorer''''' unter ''Extras→Internetoptionen→Sicherheit→[Stufe auswählen]→Stufe anpassen→Scripting'', im '''''Firefox''''' unter ''Extras→Einstellungen→Inhalt'' (de-)aktivieren. Beachte, dass das Aktivieren besonders bei älteren Versionen zu Sicherheitslücken führen kann.}}}}}}
| el =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] Η JavaScript είναι ενεργή.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] Η JavaScript είναι απενεργοποιημένη στον φυλλομετρητή σας.}}}}}}
| en =

{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript is disabled in your browser.}}}}}}
| hu =

{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] A JavaScript nincs engedélyezve a böngésződben.}}}}}}
| mk =

{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript is disabled in your browser.}}}}}}

| vi =

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{LangSwitch | bn =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট সক্রিয় আছে।}}}}}}

Beachte, dass das Aktivieren besonders bei älteren Versionen zu Sicherheitslücken führen kann.}}}}}}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{LangSwitch | bn =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট সক্রিয় আছে।}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] আপনার ব্রাউজারে জাভাস্ক্রিপ্ট নিষ্ক্রিয় করে রাখা হয়েছে।}}}}}}
| de =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] Du hast JavaScript aktiviert.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript ist in Deinem Browser '''nicht aktiviert'''. Du kannst es im '''''Internet Explorer''''' unter ''Extras→Internetoptionen→Sicherheit→[Stufe auswählen]→Stufe anpassen→Scripting'', im '''''Firefox''''' unter ''Extras→Einstellungen→Inhalt'' (de-)aktivieren. Beachte, dass das Aktivieren besonders bei älteren Versionen zu Sicherheitslücken führen kann.}}}}}}
| el =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] Η JavaScript είναι ενεργή.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] Η JavaScript είναι απενεργοποιημένη στον φυλλομετρητή σας.}}}}}}
| en =
{{{activ|{{{1|[[File:Yes check.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript is active.}}}}}}
{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript is disabled in your browser.}}}}}}
| hu =

{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] A JavaScript nincs engedélyezve a böngésződben.}}}}}}
| mk =

{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript is disabled in your browser.}}}}}}
| pl =

{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript е оневозможен на вашиот прелистувач.}}}}}}
| pt =

{{{inactiv|{{{2|[[File:Button normal.svg|10px|link=]] JavaScript está desactivado em seu navegador.}}}}}}
| vi =
